title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・Hands Up

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: /* The spring Tenno Sho is over.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Parcae originally predicted I would lose badly,
but I put myself on the scoreboard. I can keep
putting pressure on the older generation. If I
crush them in my next race, it should change
everyone's perception of me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
My next goal is the Takarazuka Kinen.
Data analysis in progress. */
